title: Assist with fieldwork
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with fieldwork demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Assist with organisation of fieldwork

pcs.text: Purchase supplies and equipment as specified by senior staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Purchase supplies and equipment as specified by senior staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Purchase supplies and equipment as specified by senior staff.
